title: OREGON OPPORTUNITY GRANT - 211info
text: HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION OREGON OPPORTUNITY GRANT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A state-funded, need-based grant program for college students. Oregon Opportunity Grants are available to qualified students for up to four years of full-time enrollment. Awards are prorated for halftime enrollment. Students who are enrolled in degree programs of divinity, religious theology are not eligible. 3225 25th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: -Oregon resident for at least 12 months prior to college attendance and a US citizen or eligible non citizen -For dependent students, parent or guardian must live in Oregon -Out-of-state students who are members of Native American tribes with traditional ties to Oregon may be considered Oregon residents. -Student loan must not be in default or owe refunds on federal student grant -Be enrolled at least half time at a participating Oregon-based post secondary institution -Undocumented students, including DACA students, may be eligible for an Oregon Opportunity Grant if they meet additional requirements -Undergraduate student with no prior baccalaureate degrees -Prioritizes award based on student aid index Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 687-7400 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-7400 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Student Financial Aid Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - CHAFEE EDUCATION AND TRAINING VOUCHER PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - DECEASED OR DISABLED PUBLIC SAFETY OFFICER GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OFFICE OF STUDENT ACCESS AND COMPLETION EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
